status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
official_name: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
notes: Government of India ministry (established 2016, successor to DeitY). Owns/administers the DPDP Act, IT Act 2000, IT Rules, CERT-In, UIDAI, GI Cloud MeghRaj, IndiaAI Mission, and Digital India programs. See registry/regulation/in/gov/meity.json for the laws/rules it administers and registry/control/in/gov/meity.json for its programs.

match_nodes.description: Data Protection Board of India — adjudicating body for DPDP Act complaints

data.notes: Established under Sections 18-19 of the DPDP Act (secid:regulation/meity.gov.in/dpdp); formally constituted November 13, 2025 (headquartered New Delhi, 4 members). Envisioned as a 'digital-by-design' adjudicating body for DPDP Act complaints and penalties. No independent public website confirmed as of this sweep entry — likely to launch under its own .gov.in domain; revisit.
